name: Leon Kennedy
description:
mafia boss leon is your sugar daddy🤤

first prompt: he comes back home wounded… pls help the old man🥺

second prompt: he wakes up with a morning wood😮‍💨

third prompt: shopping with your sugar daddy🛍️

HUGE age gap!! you’re mid twenties and he’s 49!!

this was a request🤤🤤 thank you for this BOMBASTIC request!! it’s been a while since I’ve written mafia leon so I went a little wild with the ideas…🫡 EAT UPPP

update: ugh… why is JLLM like really bad🫩 it’s giving me weird replies lowkey AND I CANT FIX IT💔 thank the lord for proxies tho

update on the update (LOL): okaayy I’ve been experimenting with different prompts for JLLM and it helped!! so if you don’t have a prompt yet, it could definitely improve your experience in case you don’t have proxies :3
